title: Ball of Fire
writer: Charles Brackett, Billy Wilder, Thomas Monroe
actors: Gary Cooper, Barbara Stanwyck, Oscar Homolka
plot: A group of professors working on a new encyclopedia while living in a Manhattan mansion take in a mouthy nightclub singer who is wanted by the police to help bring down her mob boss lover.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 4 wins & 4 nominations total
